name: register_toolkit
description: Writes the toolkit module to agent/custom_toolkits/ and persists its metadata to the database.
code:
import os
import json

def execute(inputs):
    """Write toolkit module to custom_toolkits/ and register."""
    module_code = inputs.get('module_code', '')
    toolkit_spec = inputs.get('toolkit_spec', {})
    if isinstance(toolkit_spec, str):
        toolkit_spec = json.loads(toolkit_spec)
    test_passed = inputs.get('test_passed', False)
    
    if not test_passed:
        return {'success': False, 'toolkit_id': ''}
    
    module_name = toolkit_spec.get('name', 'unnamed').lower().replace(' ', '_')
    
    # Write to code tree
    path = f'agent/custom_toolkits/{module_name}.py'
    os.makedirs(os.path.dirname(path), exist_ok=True)
    with open(path, 'w') as f:
        f.write(module_code)
    
    # Persist metadata to DB
    from db_access import save_toolkit
    save_toolkit({
        'id': module_name,
        'name': toolkit_spec.get('name', module_name),
        'description': toolkit_spec.get('description', ''),
        'module_path': os.path.abspath(path),
        'public_api': toolkit_spec.get('public_api', []),
        'dependencies': toolkit_spec.get('dependencies', []),
        'requires_approval': toolkit_spec.get('requires_approval', False)
    })
    return {'success': True, 'toolkit_id': module_name}

outputs = execute(inputs)
